Product Description

Introducing NYC Acoustics New YouTube Karaoke System.

We all have TV's/Phones/Tablets/Laptops and computers. NYC Acoustics new YouTube karaoke system will allow you to use your existing devices to create a powerful and amazing karaoke experience. This system will allow you to take all available audio, video, and Karaoke content from YouTube and play it back on a karaoke speaker while interfacing with any of your existing devices to view the words to the songs on a screen of your choice (TV, tablet, laptop, computer, iPhone, etc).

Karaoke Made simple:

Getting started takes less than 2 minutes in 3 easy steps:

Step 1- Decide which device you would like to use as your karaoke viewing screen (iPad, iPhone, Android, Laptop, or Television! (Connection cables included).
Step 2- Plug device in with provided RCA cable into the back of the powered speaker.
Step 3- Plug wireless microphone receiver into the back of the powered speaker with included (XLR-1/4") cable.
Now you are ready to get started!

-Turn on your device, the speaker and the Microphone receiver. Go to on your device.
-Type whichever Song name + the word Karaoke you would like to sing into YouTubes Search Field.
-Adjust the volume of the speaker and/or microphones as you see fit.

Now you’re ready to Rock out with NYC Acoustics!!!

How we came up with this concept:
I work for Audio Savings and just started here pretty recently. I have always been in love with karaoke and wanted a karaoke system in my house. Most karaoke machines on the market are either very expensive, or the cheaper ones do not sound great. They also all require you to buy these CD-G discs to get the words onto a TV screen. These discs are hard to find though. I thought there must be a better way.

I was talking with some of the audio engineers about my dilemma and they gave me a rock solid solution which is how this concept came to life.

The solution was demoed to me in our office. It was simple to connect. After 2 minutes of plugging in 3 wires the results blew my mind! We had youtube from one of our office computers up on our big screen TV. We had the sound coming out of the NYC Acoustics speaker which sounded amazing! The wireless mics were also co nected to the speakers and also sounded flawless! I was able to sing along. The sound was superior to many other Karaoke applications I have tried. RCA cables are the backbone of your audio system. They are used for transferring audio and video signals. Without a proper cable and good signal, you can have a distortion, which would hold your system back from performing at its optimal capabilities. Don't ever settle for cheap RCA's because they will not provide a clean signal to your amplifiers or video sources.

These Rockville RCA cables are 100 % copper, and feature advanced technologies like triple shielding, magnetic interference rejection, woven outer shield, and more. The best way to ensure that you’ll have a good setup is to invest in good cables.

Authorized Rockville Dealer

Description:

All Rockville pro audio cables are made with 100% copper which boosts the efficiency of the cable. There is nothing better than 100% copper. Most of the cheaper cables on the market do not use 100% copper, instead they make their cables with CCA (Copper Clad Aluminum). CCA cables do not perform on the level that 100% copper cables perform at. CCA will not conduct signals efficiently. A 12 gauge CCA cable will not even perform as well as a 14 gauge 100% pure copper cable, which will in turn, affect the performance and longevity of your equipment. If you find cables on the market that do not mention the copper content, there is a good chance that they are selling you a cheaper cable that is CCA and not 100% copper. Rockville pays an inspection company to oversee the manufacturing of the product to ensure that we provide a 100% Oxygen Free Copper Cable (OFC). Our OFC cables are less prone to oxidation, and will provide maximum signal transfer.

The other important factor of a cable is the shielding. Most of the good brands on the market have about 85% shielding coverage, so we decided to take our shielding a step further. Rockville cables are shielded with a tight copper mesh, covering 90% of the cable! The high percentage of coverage increases the ability to absorb the Electromagnetic Interference (EMI) and Radio Frequency Interference (RFI) that suppresses signal and degrades the performance of equipment. Rockville Cable’s copper shielding provides great flexibility, maintains a durable structural integrity, while decreasing signal interference ensuring enhanced signal clarity with every use.
